title: Bulat-Batyr
writer: A. Shakirov, Yuri Tarich, Nathan Zarkhi
actors: Vasili Yaroslavtsev, Ada Voytsik, Ivan Klyukvin
plot: In a small Tatar village during the traditional holiday of the beginning of plowing, monks appear accompanied by soldiers. Trying to convert the local population to Orthodoxy by force, the monks and soldiers meet a tough rebuff fr...
